zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Ferneley於1518年出生在英國素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得時，她的父親Sir William Henry Ferneley28歲，母親Lady Agnes Daundy23歲。她於1539年1月1日與Steven Timbrell在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1595年6月17日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Ferneley于1518年出生在英国素福爾可可廷 聖 彼得时，她的父亲Sir William Henry Ferneley28岁，母亲Lady Agnes Daundy23岁。她于1539年1月1日与Steven Timbrell在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1595年6月17日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferneley
meanings: Irish: Fearn, a helmet, and lac, people, meaning a warlike people

variants.name: Fernly
meanings: Irish: Fearn, a helmet, and lac, people, meaning a warlike people

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Ferneley was born in 1518, in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir William Henry Ferneley, was 28 and her mother, Lady Agnes Daundy, was 23. She married Steven Timbrell on 1 January 1539, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 17 June 1595, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Ferneley est née en 1518, à Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Henry Ferneley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Daundy, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Steven Timbrell le 1 janvier 1539, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 17 juin 1595, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Ferneley 1518 in Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Henry Ferneley 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes Daundy 23. Sie hat am 1. Januar 1539 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Steven Timbrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 17. Juni 1595 im Alter von 77 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Ferneley è nata il nel 1518 nel Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir William Henry Ferneley, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes Daundy, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Steven Timbrell il 1 gennaio 1539, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 17 giugno 1595, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Ferneleyが1518年にイギリススフォルククレエティング スト ペターで生まれた時，父Sir William Henry Ferneleyは28歳，母Lady Agnes Daundyは23歳であった。1539年1月1日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでSteven Timbrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1595年6月17日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Ferneley(이)가 1518년 영국 수폴크 크릿잉 스트 피터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Henry Ferneley(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes Daundy(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1539년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Steven Timbrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1595년 6월 17일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Ferneley nasceu em 1518, em Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Henry Ferneley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Daundy, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Steven Timbrell em 1 de janeiro de 1539, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 17 de junho de 1595, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Ferneley родилась в 1518 г. в местности критинг ст питир, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Henry Ferneley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Daundy, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Steven Timbrell 1 января 1539 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 17 июня 1595 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Ferneley nació en 1518, en Creeting St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Henry Ferneley, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Daundy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Steven Timbrell el 1 de enero de 1539, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 17 de junio de 1595, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
